name: pmm-os
description: PMM OS for Codex: adapted PMM, GTM, PLG, product lifecycle, competitive intelligence, OSP technical marketing, campaign, coaching, PRD, prototype, and artifact workflows.

interface.shortDescription: A cohesive PMM, GTM, PLG, and product-lifecycle operating system for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that adapts multiple open PMM, GTM, product, PLG, OSP technical marketing, campaign, coaching, and artifact-generation repositories into one cohesive PMM OS with skills, hooks, local MCP routing tools, agent templates, source adapters, and multi-format deliverable generation.
defaultPrompt: Use PMM OS to create a product marketing context file, then turn it into positioning, ICP, messaging, and proof points.
Use PMM OS to create a full launch deliverable pack: launch brief, campaign brief, emails, social posts, sales enablement, deck outline, image briefs, and measurement plan.
Use PMM OS to review this GTM plan like a senior PMM coach, pressure test weak assumptions, then revise the deliverable.
Use PMM OS to turn this signal into an account research brief and outbound sequence with measurement targets.
Use PMM OS to build a campaign brief and export-ready artifact plan for docs, slides, social, HTML, CSV, and image-generation prompts.
Use PMM OS to diagnose our PLG funnel, identify the AHA moment, design a PQL model, and produce a 30-60-90 experiment roadmap.
Use PMM OS to run a full product lifecycle workflow: research, positioning, roadmap, PRD, prototype, launch plan, and post-launch learning report.
Use PMM OS to turn this feature idea into a PRD, acceptance criteria, analytics events, HTML prototype brief, and GTM implications.
Use PMM OS to create a sales-ready battlecard and sales talk track for this competitor.
Use PMM OS to run a positioning exercise, then turn the result into messaging pillars and a launch brief.
Use PMM OS to build a competitive pricing analysis with feature gating and value metric recommendations.
Use PMM OS to create an OSP-style value map and technical content optimization brief.
Use PMM OS to score this account list against our ICP and build the signal-triggered outreach sequence.
